# Resource (hush_aws_access_key_access_privilege)

Manage AWS access key access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create an AWS access key access privilege
resource "hush_aws_access_key_access_privilege" "example" {
  name        = "s3-read-access"
  description = "AWS S3 read access privilege"
  policies    = ["arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3ReadOnlyAccess"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the AWS access key access privilege
- `policies` (List of String) The list of IAM policy ARNs

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the AWS access key access privilege

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the AWS access key access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege
